ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the employee has */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "job_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Job satisfaction score of the employee */,
  "engagement_level" REAL /* Engagement level of the employee */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role */,
  "role_salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnover event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee involved in the turnover */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the turnover event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of turnover */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for the turnover */,
  "years_tenure" INTEGER /* Number of years the employee has been with the company */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the turnover */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of addressing the turnover */,
  "termination_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES turnover_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_events_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_events_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES turnover_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Score representing the employee's engagement level */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement survey */,
  "engagement_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the employee's engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_engagement_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_tenure" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tenure */,
  "years_tenure" INTEGER /* Total years of tenure */,
  "tenure_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the employee's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_tenure_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turnover event */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of cost associated with the turnover */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_costs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES turnover_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the turnover event */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_category" TEXT /* Category of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnover_benefits_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES turnover_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the reason for turnover */,
  "reason_category" TEXT /* Category of the reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnover_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the turnover type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the turnover type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the manager is responsible for */,
  "manager_level" INTEGER /* Level of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of budget allocated */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Score representing the employee's performance */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "performance_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the employee's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "new_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new role after promotion */,
  "promotion_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_promotions_new_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary is effective */,
  "salary_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exit_interviews" (
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit interview record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date of the exit interview */,
  "exit_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the exit interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_interviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stay_interviews" (
  "stay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stay interview record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "stay_date" TEXT /* Date of the stay interview */,
  "stay_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the stay interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stay_interviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
